data.content: Plan: inspect the Overview matrix header implementation and tests; reproduce the current narrow-column overflow using the screenshot data shape if possible; replace the header layout with a measured equal-height header row where the label/icon/count cluster can wrap as independent items; make the label wrap within its own component using min-width:0 and overflow-wrap:anywhere instead of truncation; add or update tests covering wrapped labels and uniform header height; validate with lint/typecheck/tests/build and rendered browser screenshots at desktop and narrow widths.
